title: Korak 14

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents: freeCodeCamp News Author Page
challengeFiles.seed: freeCodeCamp News Author Page

challengeFiles.name: styles
script

hooks.beforeAll: window.fetch = () => Promise.resolve({json: () => Promise.resolve([{ author: 'Whoever', image: 'data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///ywAAAAAAQABAAACAUwAOw==', url: "http://not-a-real-url.nowhere/", bio: 'words go here' }])});

tests.text: Vaš anker element bi trebalo da ima class "author-link".
Trebali biste da interpolirate url as vrednost atributa vašeg anker elementa href.
Trebalo bi da set atribut target vašeg anker elementa na "_blank".
Trebalo bi da interpolirate author praćen tekstom "'s author page" unutar vašeg anker elementa.

description:
Zatim, dodajte link ka stranici autora na freeCodeCamp News.

Dodajte ankorni element sa atributom class vrednosti "author-link", interpolirajte url kao vrednost za atribut href, i postavite target na "_blank". Za tekst ankornog elementa, interpolirajte author praćen tekstom "'s author page". Na primer, "Quincy Larson's author page".
